courseDetails.longDescription:
Are you ready to become a Microsoft Office power user?

This all-in-one Microsoft Office Masterclass is designed to take you from beginner to advanced in Word, Excel, and PowerPoint – the three most essential tools in the Microsoft Office suite. Whether you're a student, professional, entrepreneur, or someone looking to boost productivity, this course gives you real-world, job-ready skills to thrive in any industry.

What You’ll Learn:

Microsoft Word: Craft Professional Documents with Finesse

  • Master document creation and formatting: Learn to effectively use styles, themes, and page layouts to create visually appealing and organized documents.

  • Enhance your writing with advanced features: Explore tables, mail merge, headers/footers, and advanced text manipulation techniques.

  • Collaborate and secure your documents: Discover tools for tracking changes, commenting, and protecting your work.

  • Automate repetitive tasks: Get an introduction to macros for increased efficiency.

Microsoft Excel: Become a Spreadsheet Wizard for Data Analysis

  • Conquer spreadsheet fundamentals: Master data entry, cell formatting, and basic calculations.

  • Unleash the power of formulas and functions: Learn to use a wide array of functions (lookup, logical, statistical, etc.) for powerful data manipulation.

  • Visualize your data with stunning charts and graphs: Create compelling visuals to communicate insights effectively.

  • Perform in-depth data analysis: Explore tools like Conditional Formatting, Goal Seek, and Solver for robust data interpretation.

  • Automate your workflow: Dive into Excel Macros for increased productivity and efficiency.


Microsoft PowerPoint: Design Captivating and Impactful Presentations

  • Create engaging slides from scratch: Learn to effectively use slide layouts, themes, and design principles.

  • Bring your presentations to life with animation and transitions: Master customizing animations, transitions, and multimedia elements (audio, video).

  • Streamline your design process: Understand the power of Slide Master and layouts for consistent branding.

  • Deliver impactful presentations: Learn techniques for effective communication, storytelling, and using speaker notes.

  • Incorporate external data: Seamlessly integrate charts, tables, and objects from other applications.


Who Is This Course For?

  • Anyone want to learn MS Office for Word, Excel and PowerPoint

Get lifetime access, learn at your own pace, and join thousands of students building their Microsoft Office skills with this comprehensive masterclass.

Boost your productivity and career—enroll now and start mastering Microsoft Office today!

Master Defect Management, QA Reporting & KPIs – Elevate Your Software Quality with Actionable Metrics & KPIs

Want to gain full control over your QA process and confidently communicate software quality to stakeholders? This course is your complete guide to defect management, QA reporting, and quality metrics — designed to help you lead your QA efforts with data, not guesswork.

"Defect Management & QA Reporting: Metrics & KPIs" is a hands-on, practical course that shows you how to track, analyze, and improve your QA process using industry-proven metrics and reporting practices. What You Will Learn

  • Techniques for root cause analysis, defect triage, and severity-priority alignment

  • Strategies to avoid common pitfalls in bug tracking and status reporting

  • Aligning QA metrics with business goals to show ROI of testing efforts

This course gives you not just theory—but practical templates, real-world examples, and step-by-step demonstrations to apply what you learn right away.


Who This Course is For

  • QA Engineers and Manual Testers who want to bring clarity and structure to their defect tracking

  • Automation Engineers seeking to integrate defect and test metrics into CI/CD pipelines

  • QA Leads and Managers looking to improve visibility, traceability, and reporting practices

  • Scrum Masters and Agile Teams who need reliable quality insights per sprint or release

  • Business Analysts and Product Managers interested in understanding and interpreting quality reports


What Makes This Course Different

Most QA courses focus only on test execution. This one gives you the data-driven backbone of QA work — metrics, reporting, and quality control. You’ll learn how to turn bugs into valuable insights, how to build trust with stakeholders using data, and how to level up your QA career through analytics and visibility.


By the end of this course, you'll be able to track defects with confidence, build reports that influence decisions, and measure QA success with the right KPIs.

Sign up now and transform your QA efforts into a measurable, strategic force for software quality.

courseDetails.title: Agile Mindset & Adaptability: The Complete Guide to XP
courseDetails.shortDescription: Efficient Software Development: Speed Up Work, Reduce Bugs & Improve Code Quality wtih Extreme Programming
courseDetails.longDescription:
Extreme Programming (XP) is one of the most effective Agile methodologies, designed to improve software quality, team collaboration, and development speed. This course provides a comprehensive, hands-on guide to XP, covering key practices like Test-Driven Development (TDD), Continuous Integration (CI/CD), Pair Programming, Code Refactoring, and Incremental Development.

In today's fast-paced software industry, teams must adapt quickly to change, write maintainable code, and deliver high-quality software with minimal bugs. Extreme Programming provides the framework to achieve this by promoting frequent feedback, iterative releases, and disciplined engineering practices.

By the end of this course, you will gain practical, real-world experience applying XP methodologies to improve productivity, reduce technical debt, and foster effective team collaboration. Whether you are a developer, team lead, tester, or Agile coach, this course will equip you with the skills needed to integrate XP into your development workflow and build high-performing teams.


What You Will Learn in This Course

  1. Introduction to Extreme Programming (XP) – Understand the core principles, values, and benefits of XP in Agile development.

  2. Agile Mindset and XP’s Role – Learn how XP aligns with Agile frameworks like Scrum, Kanban, and Lean development.

  3. Test-Driven Development (TDD) in Action – Master the cycle of writing tests before code to improve reliability and maintainability.

  4. Pair Programming Techniques – Learn how two developers can collaborate effectively to write higher-quality code with fewer bugs.

  5. Continuous Integration (CI) and Continuous Deployment (CD) – Automate testing and deployments to improve efficiency and code stability.

  6. Refactoring Strategies for Maintainable Code – Identify and improve existing code while preserving functionality.

  7. Collective Code Ownership and Team Collaboration – Encourage knowledge sharing and collective responsibility for high-quality code.

  8. Frequent Releases and Small Iterations – Develop software in small, manageable increments to ensure continuous feedback and adaptability.

  9. Simple Design and YAGNI (You Ain’t Gonna Need It) – Implement only necessary features to reduce complexity and technical debt.

  10. Customer Collaboration and Feedback Loops – Involve stakeholders early and often to build user-centric applications.

  11. User Stories and Agile Planning – Write and prioritize user stories to align development with business needs.

  12. Automated Testing Beyond TDD – Explore integration testing, acceptance testing, and end-to-end testing strategies.

  13. Handling Technical Debt in Agile Projects – Learn how XP minimizes long-term maintenance costs by enforcing best practices.

  14. Agile Metrics and Measuring Success – Use velocity, cycle time, and defect rates to track team performance and efficiency.

  15. Scaling XP in Larger Teams – Discover how XP principles can be adapted for enterprise-scale software development.


Who Should Take This Course?

  • Software developers and engineers who want to improve code quality and efficiency.

  • Agile practitioners, Scrum Masters, and team leads looking to integrate XP into their workflows.

  • QA engineers and testers interested in test-driven development and automation.

  • DevOps professionals who want to enhance CI/CD practices with XP methodologies.

  • Product owners and business analysts aiming to align development with business goals.

  • Anyone interested in learning Agile best practices and modern software development techniques.


Why This Course?

This course is structured to balance theory with real-world application, ensuring that learners can immediately apply XP practices in their projects. The lessons include practical examples and case studies to reinforce learning. Whether you work in a startup or a large enterprise, this course will help you improve productivity, streamline development, and write maintainable software that scales.

Prerequisites

  • Understanding of software development workflows

  • Interest in Agile methodologies and iterative software development


Get Started Today

Learn how to implement Extreme Programming (XP) techniques to deliver high-quality software, improve team collaboration, and enhance Agile workflows. Enroll now and start mastering XP for modern software development.

Secure Coding with Spring Boot: Build Resilient, Scalable & Secure Systems

Modern backend development is no longer just about writing business logic. Today’s systems must survive failures, scale under pressure, and protect sensitive data from constant threats. Whether you’re building APIs, microservices, or distributed systems - your architecture must be secure, fault-tolerant, and production-ready.

This course is built for backend developers who are serious about writing robust, secure, and scalable code with Spring Boot. You will not only learn how to implement security features but also why they matter - and how they keep real-world systems alive.

We’ll explore proven architecture patterns, cutting-edge libraries, and battle-tested best practices that are critical in high-performance, cloud-native environments.

All implementations are in Java with Spring Boot, but the design principles apply to any backend language or framework.

What You'll Learn:

  • Secure Authentication & Authorization

    • OAuth 2.0, OpenID Connect, and JWT in practice

    • Identity Providers with Auth0 integration

    • Spring Security configuration for real applications

  • Resilience Patterns with Resilience4j

    • Circuit Breakers to prevent cascading failures

    • Retry logic to recover from transient faults

    • Time Limiter and Rate Limiter to maintain system stability

    • Bulkhead pattern to isolate failures and contain damage

  • API Protection and Scalability

    • Bucket4j and Resilience4j rate limiting

    • API Gateway pattern with Spring Cloud Gateway

    • Load balancing strategies using Spring Cloud LoadBalancer

  • Spring Boot Monitoring & Configuration

    • Spring Boot Actuator for live metrics and health checks

    • Application properties for environment-specific configurations

    • Custom TLS, context paths, and logging levels


Why This Course Is Different:

Most tutorials focus only on basic CRUD operations or toy examples. This course is focused on real production challenges and resilient system design. You’ll understand how to:

  • Think like a software architect when building secure services

  • Write code that’s ready for deployment in modern distributed systems

Everything is supported with live coding sessions, practical exercises, and realistic examples that mirror the issues you’ll face on the job.

Who This Course Is For:

Two Annex Sections Included

If you’re new to Spring Boot or Spring Security, you won’t be left behind. You’ll get two focused sections that teach you the fundamentals of each - before diving into the advanced material.

By the end of this course, you will be able to design, build, and deploy systems that are secure by default, resilient to failure, and ready to scale.

Bienvenue au programme : Certificat Professionnel en Gestion des Risques par le MTF Institute

Cours fourni par le MTF Institute of Management, Technology and Finance.

MTF est un institut éducatif et de recherche global basé à Lisbonne, Portugal, axé sur l'éducation hybride (en présentiel et en ligne) pour les professionnels et les entreprises dans des domaines tels que : la Gestion des Entreprises, la Science et la Technologie, la Banque et la Finance.

Le centre de R&D de MTF se concentre sur des activités de recherche dans des domaines tels que : l'Intelligence Artificielle, l'Apprentissage Automatique, la Science des Données, le Big Data, le WEB3, la Blockchain, les Cryptomonnaies et les Actifs Numériques, les Métavers, la Transformation Numérique, la Fintech, le Commerce Électronique et l'Internet des Objets.

MTF est partenaire officiel de : IBM, Intel, Microsoft, et membre de la Chambre de Commerce et d'Industrie Portugaise.

MTF est présent dans 216 pays et a été choisi par plus de 740 000 étudiants.



Autrice du cours :

La Dr. Alex Amoroso est une professionnelle expérimentée avec une vaste expérience dans les domaines académique et industriel, spécialisée dans les méthodologies de recherche, la formulation de stratégies et le développement de produits. Titulaire d'un doctorat à l'École des Sciences Sociales et Politiques à Lisbonne, Portugal, où elle a été honorée pour sa recherche exemplaire, Alex Amoroso apporte une grande expertise et expérience.

En plus de ses études doctorales, Mme Amoroso a été professeure invitée, dispensant des cours à un large éventail d'étudiants, de la licence aux étudiants en affaires dans des cours professionnels et exécutifs. Actuellement, à l'EIMT à Zurich, Suisse, elle enseigne aux étudiants en doctorat, offrant un enseignement avancé sur la conception de recherches et les méthodologies, et au MTF Institute, Mme Amoroso dirige le domaine académique du Développement de Produits.

En combinant l'expérience académique et professionnelle, Mme Amoroso a obtenu de grands résultats dans sa carrière en dirigeant des activités de R&D, de développement de produits, de stratégie et d'analyse de marché dans divers secteurs. Elle a mis en œuvre les meilleures pratiques du marché dans des industries telles que la Banque et la Finance, le PropTech, le Conseil et la Recherche, ainsi que dans des Startups Innovantes.

La production scientifique d’Alex Amoroso est vaste et comprend de nombreux articles publiés dans des revues scientifiques reconnues ainsi que des présentations orales et des affiches lors de conférences internationales. Ses travaux de recherche ont été présentés dans des institutions de renom telles que l'École des Sciences Politiques et Sociales et la Conférence Stressed Out à UCL, entre autres.

Passionnée par la collaboration interdisciplinaire et déterminée à impulser un changement positif, Alex Amoroso est dédiée à la formation des étudiants et des professionnels dans l'utilisation de méthodologies de pointe pour atteindre l'excellence dans le monde des affaires global.


Khadija M'tag, traductrice du programme, possède une solide expérience en finance, en formation et en traduction professionnelle. Elle a participé à plusieurs projets financiers, animé des formations, et travaille actuellement avec des clients internationaux à qui elle apporte son expertise.


Dans un environnement commercial en constante évolution et de plus en plus complexe, la capacité à anticiper, évaluer et gérer les risques est devenue une compétence indispensable pour toute organisation souhaitant assurer sa pérennité et atteindre ses objectifs stratégiques. Notre cours complet sur la Gestion des Risques vous offre les connaissances fondamentales et les outils pratiques nécessaires pour naviguer avec succès dans ce paysage incertain.

Ce programme est conçu pour vous doter d'une compréhension approfondie et d'une maîtrise pratique des diverses facettes de la gestion des risques :

  • Introduction aux Fondamentaux : Vous débuterez par une compréhension approfondie de ce qu'est un risque, ses différentes typologies (stratégiques, opérationnels, financiers, de conformité, de réputation) et l'importance cruciale d'une approche proactive. Nous explorerons les processus clés et les avantages d'une gestion des risques efficace, y compris les concepts d'appétit et de tolérance au risque, et l'impact d'une culture du risque positive.

  • Identification et Évaluation Précise : Découvrez les techniques systématiques pour identifier les risques potentiels (brainstorming, analyse SWOT, scénarios, données historiques). Vous apprendrez ensuite à évaluer la probabilité d'occurrence et l'impact potentiel de chaque risque, en utilisant des outils comme les matrices de risques pour une hiérarchisation efficace et une documentation rigoureuse.

  • Cadres et Processus Structurés : Explorez les cadres de référence reconnus mondialement comme COSO ERM, ISO 31000 et NIST, qui fournissent des principes et des lignes directrices pour une gestion cohérente. Vous comprendrez l'importance des processus bien définis et comment intégrer la gestion des risques dans la planification stratégique, la prise de décision et les opérations quotidiennes de votre organisation.

  • Stratégies de Traitement et d'Atténuation : Maîtrisez les quatre grandes options de traitement des risques – l'évitement, l'atténuation, le transfert et l'acceptation. Le cours détaillera l'élaboration de plans de traitement des risques et la mise en place de contrôles efficaces (préventifs, détectives, correctifs), tout en abordant le concept crucial de risque résiduel.

  • Gestion des Risques Spécifiques : Plongez dans les spécificités de la Gestion du Risque Opérationnel (erreurs humaines, défaillances systèmes, perturbations de la chaîne d'approvisionnement), du Risque Financier (risque de marché, de crédit, de liquidité) et du Risque de Cybersécurité (malware, phishing, violations de données). Chaque section inclura des exemples concrets et les meilleures pratiques sectorielles pour une application pertinente.

  • Risques Émergents et Tendances Futures : Anticipez les défis de demain en identifiant les risques émergents liés au changement climatique, aux instabilités géopolitiques, aux perturbations de la chaîne d'approvisionnement et aux nouvelles technologies (Intelligence Artificielle, Internet des Objets). Découvrez comment les tendances comme l'intégration des risques, la résilience organisationnelle et les considérations ESG (Environnementales, Sociales et de Gouvernance) façonnent l'avenir de la gestion des risques.

  • Gouvernance, Conformité et Reporting : Comprenez le rôle essentiel de la gouvernance des risques, le rôle du conseil d'administration et de la direction, l'importance de la conformité aux réglementations et normes (ex: RGPD, Bâle III), et les meilleures pratiques de reporting pour assurer la transparence et la responsabilité à tous les niveaux de l'organisation.

  • Éthique et Standards Professionnels : Abordez les principes éthiques fondamentaux et les normes professionnelles (tels que ceux de la GARP) qui sont le pilier d'une pratique responsable et intègre de la gestion des risques. Vous apprendrez à naviguer dans les dilemmes éthiques et à cultiver une culture éthique forte au sein de votre organisation.


En complétant ce programme, vous serez mieux équipé pour prendre des décisions éclairées, protéger la valeur de votre entreprise et transformer les défis en opportunités.

Rejoignez-nous et devenez un acteur clé de la sécurité et de la réussite de votre organisation !

courseDetails.title: POSH 2.0: Prevention of Sexual Harassment in India

courseDetails.longDescription:
“This course contains the use of artificial intelligence.”

In the evolving corporate landscape of 2025, the Prevention of Sexual Harassment (POSH) Act has shifted from a passive compliance checklist to a critical governance metric. With the Ministry of Corporate Affairs (MCA) now mandating detailed annual reporting on harassment cases and the Supreme Court expanding jurisdiction to include external contractors, organizations face a new era of accountability. This course provides a definitive, enterprise-grade guide to navigating these legal mandates while fostering a culture of psychological safety.


The curriculum is designed to demystify the complex legal framework of the Sexual Harassment of Women at Workplace Act, 2013, while addressing modern challenges such as virtual harassment and "extended workplace" doctrines. Learners will move beyond basic definitions to explore the nuances of consent, the impact of "intent vs. impact," and the specific liabilities managers face under the concept of "deemed knowledge".


Key areas of focus include the operational mechanics of the Internal Committee (IC), detailing its powers as a quasi-judicial body and the rigorous steps required for a fair inquiry comprising natural justice principles. The course creates clarity on the distinction between conciliation and formal inquiry, ensuring learners understand the strict prohibition on monetary settlements during conciliation. Furthermore, it addresses the 2025 compliance environment, where failure to disclose pending cases can trigger regulatory scrutiny and penalties for directors.


Structuring learning through five comprehensive sections, the course covers the legal landscape, behavioral decoding of virtual and physical harassment, redressal mechanisms, leadership obligations, and cultural interventions like bystander training. It is tailored for the modern Indian workforce, addressing the friction between Gen Z expectations and traditional corporate norms, and providing actionable protocols for managing third-party harassment involving clients or vendors.


By bridging the gap between statutory requirements and daily operations, this training equips professionals to mitigate legal risk, handle disclosures with empathy, and build a respectful, compliant, and inclusive workplace.

courseDetails.title: Entrepreneurship and Business Research in Biomedical
courseDetails.shortDescription: Self Learning Course
courseDetails.longDescription:
Overview
Entrepreneurship, Business, and Research Project in Biomedical Engineering is a course that focuses on teaching students about the intersection of biomedical engineering, entrepreneurship, and business. The course is designed to give students a comprehensive understanding of how to develop a research project in the field of biomedical engineering, as well as the skills and knowledge needed to turn that research into a successful business venture.

Entrepreneurship refers to the process of identifying a need in the market, developing a product or service to address that need, and then bringing that product or service to market. In the context of biomedical engineering, entrepreneurship involves identifying a need for new medical devices, therapies, or diagnostic tools, developing prototypes, conducting clinical trials, and bringing the product to market.

Business refers to the set of activities involved in the creation, operation, and management of a commercial enterprise. In the context of biomedical engineering, students learn about the legal, financial, and ethical considerations that come with starting and running a biomedical engineering company.

Finally, the research project component of the course involves developing a research project in the field of biomedical engineering. This may involve conducting experiments, analyzing data, and presenting findings in a scientific report or presentation. Students may work independently or as part of a team to develop a research project, and will receive guidance and support from the course instructor.

Overall, the course is designed to give students a broad understanding of the various aspects of entrepreneurship, business, and research in the field of biomedical engineering, and to prepare them for careers in the biomedical engineering industry.

Benefits of Learning
Learning entrepreneurship, business, and research project in biomedical engineering course can provide a range of benefits for students. Some of the benefits include:

  • Development of entrepreneurial skills: The course can help students develop skills such as identifying market needs, developing and testing products, and launching a business. These skills are essential for individuals who want to start their own biomedical engineering business.

  • Understanding of the business side of biomedical engineering: The course can help students understand the legal, financial, and ethical considerations that come with starting and running a biomedical engineering company. This knowledge can help students make better decisions when launching their own ventures or working for a biomedical engineering company.

  • Preparation for a career in biomedical engineering: The course can provide students with a comprehensive understanding of the field of biomedical engineering, including the latest developments in medical devices, therapies, and diagnostic tools. This knowledge can be valuable for students who want to pursue a career in biomedical engineering.

  • Exposure to research methods: The course can expose students to different research methods, including designing experiments, collecting data, and analyzing results. This knowledge can be useful for students who want to pursue a career in research or who want to pursue a graduate degree in biomedical engineering.

  • Collaboration with peers: The course typically involves working in teams to develop a research project or launch a business. This collaboration can help students develop teamwork and communication skills that are essential in the workplace.

Overall, learning entrepreneurship, business, and research project in biomedical engineering course can provide students with a wide range of skills and knowledge that can be valuable for pursuing a career in the biomedical engineering industry.

Who can Learn
Entrepreneurship, Business, and Research Project in Biomedical Engineering Course can be beneficial for a variety of individuals who have an interest in the field of biomedical engineering. Some potential groups who can benefit from this course are:

दुनिया निरंतर परिवर्तन की स्थिति में है, और इसके साथ ही जोखिम परिदृश्य भी लगातार विकसित हो रहा है। नए जोखिम उभरते हैं, मौजूदा जोखिम विकसित होते हैं और वैश्विक प्रणालियों की परस्पर जुड़ाव का मतलब है, कि जोखिम जल्दी से फैल सकते हैं और बढ़ सकते हैं। संगठनों को इन उभरते जोखिमों और रुझानों की पहचान करने और प्रतिक्रिया देने के लिए सतर्क रहना होगा ताकि वे अपनी Resilience बनाए रख सकें और अपने Goals प्राप्त कर सकें।


मुख्य विषय:


  • जोखिम क्या है?

  • जोखिम के प्रकार

  • जोखिम की पहचान : जोखिम को समझना और उनका आकलन करना।

  • जोखिम रजिस्टर

  • जोखिम पहचान में स्टेकहोल्डर्स

  • जोखिम विश्लेषण तकनीकें

  • जोखिम ग्रहण करने की इच्छा और जोखिम सहनशीलता

  • जोखिम शमन रणनीतियाँ

Course Authors:

1. Dr. Alex Amoroso एक अनुभवी प्रोफेशनल हैं, जिनका शैक्षणिक और उद्योग क्षेत्र में समृद्ध अनुभव है। वे शोध विधियों (Research Methodologies), रणनीति निर्माण (Strategy Formulation) और उत्पाद विकास (Product Development) में विशेषज्ञ हैं। उन्होंने School of Social Sciences and Politics, Lisbon, Portugal से डॉक्टरेट की डिग्री प्राप्त की है, जहाँ उन्हें उनकी उत्कृष्ट शोध के लिए विशेष सम्मान और डिस्टिंक्शन से नवाज़ा गया।

डॉक्टरेट की पढ़ाई के साथ-साथ, Ms. Amoroso ने एक आमंत्रित शिक्षिका (Invited Teacher) के रूप में भी कार्य किया है, जहाँ उन्होंने अंडरग्रेजुएट से लेकर प्रोफेशनल और एग्जीक्यूटिव कोर्सेज के बिज़नेस स्टूडेंट्स तक को पढ़ाया है। वर्तमान में, वे EIMT, Zurich, Switzerland में डॉक्टोरल छात्रों को पढ़ा रही हैं, जहाँ वे शोध डिज़ाइन (Research Design) और मेथडोलॉजीज़ (Methodologies) पर एडवांस्ड इंस्ट्रक्शन देती हैं। साथ ही, MTF Institute में वे Product Development के अकादमिक डोमेन की प्रमुख हैं।

शैक्षणिक और व्यावसायिक अनुभवों के समन्वय से, Ms. Amoroso ने अपने व्यवसायिक करियर में शानदार उपलब्धियाँ हासिल की हैं। उन्होंने विभिन्न कंपनियों में R&D गतिविधियाँ, उत्पाद विकास, रणनीतिक योजना, और बाज़ार विश्लेषण (Market Analysis) का नेतृत्व किया है। उन्होंने बैंकिंग और फाइनेंस, PropTech, कंसल्टिंग और रिसर्च, और इनोवेटिव स्टार्टअप्स जैसे क्षेत्रों में बेहतरीन बाज़ार प्रथाओं को लागू किया है।

Alex Amoroso की वैज्ञानिक उपलब्धियों में अनेक शोध पत्रों का प्रकाशन शामिल है, जो प्रतिष्ठित जर्नल्स में प्रकाशित हुए हैं। इसके साथ ही उन्होंने कई अंतरराष्ट्रीय सम्मेलनों में मौखिक प्रस्तुतियाँ और पोस्टर्स के माध्यम से अपने शोध कार्य प्रस्तुत किए हैं। उनके शोध निष्कर्षों को School of Political and Social Sciences और Stressed Out Conference at UCL जैसी प्रतिष्ठित संस्थाओं में प्रस्तुत किया जा चुका है।

अंतरविषयी सहयोग (Interdisciplinary Collaboration) के प्रति गहरी रुचि और सकारात्मक परिवर्तन लाने की प्रतिबद्धता के साथ, Alex Amoroso समर्पित हैं शिक्षार्थियों और प्रोफेशनल्स को ऐसी एडवांस मेथडोलॉजीज़ सिखाने में, जो उन्हें वैश्विक व्यवसायिक जगत में उत्कृष्टता (Excellence in Global Business World) प्राप्त करने में सक्षम बनाती हैं।


2. Dr. Shreyasee K. एक स्वतंत्र व्याख्याता (Independent Lecturer) और कोर्स की सह-लेखिका (Course Co-author) हैं।

2025 तक, शैक्षणिक रूप से, उन्होंने Theology (धर्मशास्त्र) में डॉक्टरेट की डिग्री  (ThD) प्राप्त की है , और साथ ही वे Integrative Healing में मास्टर डिप्लोमा धारक हैं।

पेशेवर रूप से, वे पहले एक पुरस्कार-विजेता  कला विशेषज्ञ रही हैं। उन्हें उनके 2015 से 2022 के बीच के समग्र रचनात्मक कार्यों के लिए, h.c.Dr. (Honoris Causa) की उपाधि प्रदान की गई थी।

वह समय-समय पर इनोवेशन (Innovation), क्रिएटिविटी (Creativity), अप्लाइड मनोविज्ञान (Applied Psychology), आध्यात्मिकता (Spirituality) और लीडरशिप (Leadership), जैसे क्षेत्रों में अपने नॉलेज बेस को अपडेट करने के लिए सक्रिय रूप से प्रयासरत रहती हैं।

courseDetails.title: Excel ile Korelasyon ve Regresyon Analizi
courseDetails.shortDescription: SPSS kullanmadan Excel ile Uygulamalı Korelasyon, Regresyon ve Temel İstatistiki Kavramlar (Sertifikalı)
courseDetails.longDescription:
Gerek iş dünyasında gerekse eğitim hayatımızda bir konu ile ilgili bilimsel düzeyde araştırma yapmak veya bir problemi çözmek istiyorsak en sık başvurduğumuz araçlardan ikisi korelasyon ve regresyon analizleridir. Bu analiz türlerinden en sık kullanılanları ise Pearson Korelasyon Analizi ve diğer tarafta doğrusal regresyon analizleridir. İş hayatınızda ekip yönetimi, proje yönetimi, iş geliştirme, eğitim vb. işlerle ilgileniyorsanız, tez veya proje hazırlayacaksanız ya da korelasyon, regresyon konusunda bilgi edinmek istiyorsanız ve bunu herhangi bir sebeple SPSS gibi farklı bir program / yazılım kullanmadan sağlayacaksanız doğru yerdesiniz. Bu kursta temel olarak istatistiki kavramlarla birlikte hem formüllerle hem de Excel Veri Çözümleme eklentisi ile a’dan z’ye Pearson Korelasyon Analizi ve Doğrusal Regresyon Analizi modellerini öğrenecek ve uygulayabileceksiniz. Kurs içeriğinin detaylı içeriği aşağıdaki gibidir:


  • Hipotez kurulması

  • Anakütle-Örneklem Kavramı

  • Değişken kavramı

  • Ortalama, mod, medyan gibi temel istatistiki kavramlar

  • Varyans ve standart sapma kavramı ve hesaplamaları

  • Normallik Dağılımı varsayımı ve hesaplamaları

  • Güvenilirlik düzeyi, alfa değeri ve güven aralığı hesaplamaları

  • Anlamlılık katsayıları hesaplamaları

  • Korelasyon kavramı ve türleri

  • Doğrusallık grafiklerinin hazırlanması

  • Uç (Aykırı) değerlerin tespit edilmesi

  • Durbin Watson katsayısının hesaplanması

  • A’dan Z’ye Pearson Korelasyon Analizinin Yapılması

  • A’dan Z’ye Basit Doğrusal Regresyon Analizinin Yapılması

  • A’dan Z’ye Çoklu Doğrusal Regresyon Analizinin Yapılması


Kursta hemen hemen konuların tamamı temel düzeyde anlatıldığı ve işlendiği için basit düzeyde Excel bilgisine sahip olmanız kurs içeriğini kavramanız için yeterli olacaktır.

courseDetails.title: Software Architecture and Clean Code Design in OOP
courseDetails.shortDescription: Learn design patterns and principles for Object-oriented programming to make your software scalable and easy to maintain
courseDetails.longDescription:
From this course, you can learn Software Architecture and Clean Code Design in OOP.

There are a lot of other courses on this topic. So, why would you choose exactly this course?  Here are just a few reasons:

- Coding examples

To learn to program is not enough just watching videos and reading books. You also need to have a lot of practice. In this training course, you will review multiple practical tasks and coding examples which will help you learn and understand Java better.


- Open source code

We hide nothing from our students! Including the source code for the home task solutions and source code of examples that were shared during the lesson. Having the source code you can just copy and paste it to run it on your local computer to understand how things work better.

You are allowed to use all source code examples for learning purposes. This helps significantly to configure the environment and make tests work, especially in case students didn't work with any testing framework in the past.

- Q&A support 

The significant difference between the online and offline learning process is the instructor's availability. If you are in one room with a tutor he always can help you to get understand the specific concept or to help fix your code on your computer.
In this course, we are supporting students with answers to any questions flagged in the Q&A section. In case there will be recurring questions - separate video lessons will be created to show how to address the issue.

So with this course you are not just getting video materials, code exercises, source code, access to the free mobile application without limits (which is still pretty cool, huh? :) ), but you also get tutor support and answers to your questions along with this course.

- Relevant knowledge

After our team investigated other Java courses on Udemy we realized that most of them have nothing in common with real life. The information which is shared there is very old and significantly out of date. For example, the instructor teaches a framework which is not been used already for 15 years. Or instructors do stress on the programming design which is not used anymore at all!

The instructor of this course is a consultant in a top-rated IT outsourcing company and helps to bring cutting-edge solutions in IT for all his clients. Feel free to check the LinkedIn page of the instructor and check skills endorsement. More than 19 thousand people across all over the world (BTW most of them are from the top 100 companies of the world) evaluated the skills of Andrii Piatakha.

courseDetails.title: Whistleblower Protection: Legal Frameworks & Ethics
courseDetails.shortDescription: A comprehensive guide to protected disclosures, corporate governance, ethical reporting, and legal risk management.
courseDetails.longDescription:
“This course contains the use of artificial intelligence.”

In the contemporary corporate landscape, the ability to identify, report, and manage internal misconduct is a critical component of operational resilience and regulatory compliance. Whistleblowing mechanisms serve as the primary defense against systemic fraud, safety violations, and reputational collapse. This course provides a rigorous, enterprise-grade examination of whistleblower protections, legal frameworks, and the managerial responsibilities necessary to maintain a compliant and ethical organization.


This curriculum is designed for professionals who require a deep understanding of the intersection between individual ethics, statutory law, and corporate governance. We move beyond basic definitions to explore the complex legal architectures established by the Sarbanes-Oxley Act (SOX), the Dodd-Frank Act, and OSHA regulations. Participants will gain the analytical skills to distinguish between personal grievances and legally protected disclosures, ensuring that organizational resources are focused on addressing genuine material risks.


The course is structured to guide learners through the entire lifecycle of a disclosure. It begins with the foundational principles of reportable misconduct, including financial fraud, harassment, and safety breaches. Following this, the curriculum details the specific statutory protections available to whistleblowers and the severe penalties associated with retaliation. A significant portion of the training is dedicated to the procedural mechanics of internal investigations, focusing on confidentiality, anonymity, and evidence preservation.


Furthermore, this course addresses the human element of compliance. It equips managers and leaders with strategies to foster "psychological safety," a cultural prerequisite that encourages early reporting and prevents issues from escalating into external scandals. By analyzing real-world case studies and investigation protocols, learners will understand how to operationalize transparency and accountability within their teams.


Key areas of focus include:

  • Legal & Regulatory Landscape: Comprehensive coverage of SOX, Dodd-Frank, and international directives affecting global organizations.

  • Operational Procedures: Best practices for utilizing hotlines, conducting intake, and managing the "discovery phase" of investigations.

  • Managerial Duty: Specific protocols for managers receiving reports, including immediate anti-retaliation steps and coordination with Legal/HR.

  • Risk Mitigation: Strategies to protect organizational reputation and financial stability through proactive internal controls.


This content is developed to meet the standards of corporate learning and development (L&D) departments, offering actionable insights for protecting both the whistleblower and the integrity of the institution.
targetAudiences: Compliance Officers, Risk Managers, and Internal Auditors seeking to update their regulatory knowledge.
Human Resources (HR) professionals responsible for employee relations and investigation protocols.
Corporate managers and team leaders required to handle employee concerns and ethical dilemmas.
Business students and professionals interested in corporate governance and business law.

The course will also cover namespaces, autoloading using PSR-4, and how to structure your application folders in a modern way. These skills are essential if you plan to work on larger projects or eventually dive into PHP frameworks like Laravel or Symfony.

Every topic is explained in simple, beginner-friendly language, with plenty of practical examples to reinforce your understanding. You won’t just memorize syntax — you’ll learn how to think in objects, break down a problem into logical components, and write clean, well-structured code that scales as your application grows.

  3. Pair Programming Techniques – Master collaborative coding practices to reduce errors and improve efficiency.

  4. Refactoring Strategies for Maintainable Code – Improve existing code structure while preserving functionality.

  9. Simple Design & YAGNI (You Ain’t Gonna Need It) – Avoid over-engineering and focus on essential functionality.

  10. Automated Testing Beyond TDD – Implement integration testing, acceptance testing, and end-to-end testing.

  11. Collective Code Ownership & Team Collaboration – Encourage a shared responsibility for code quality and maintainability.

  12. Measuring Agile Success – Use Agile metrics like cycle time, defect rates, and team velocity to track progress.

  13. Scaling XP for Large Teams – Adapt XP techniques to work in enterprise-scale development environments.

  14. Handling Technical Debt – Learn strategies to minimize and manage long-term software maintenance costs.

  15. Real-World XP Case Studies – Explore how top companies use XP techniques to build scalable and high-quality software.


Who Is This Course For?

  • Software Developers & Engineers – Improve software quality with XP, TDD, and refactoring techniques.

Con el aumento de las amenazas cibernéticas dirigidas a aplicaciones web, la codificación segura en Java se ha convertido en una habilidad esencial para desarrolladores y profesionales de seguridad. Muchas vulnerabilidades, como inyección SQL, cross-site scripting (XSS) y autenticación rota, pueden ser explotadas debido a malas prácticas de codificación. Este curso está diseñado para proporcionarte el conocimiento, las herramientas y la experiencia práctica necesarias para escribir código seguro en Java y proteger aplicaciones web contra ataques.

Este curso completo cubre los riesgos de seguridad más comunes en aplicaciones web basadas en Java. Aprenderás cómo los atacantes explotan vulnerabilidades, el impacto de los fallos de seguridad y cómo mitigarlos mediante las mejores prácticas. A través de ejemplos del mundo real y ejercicios prácticos, comprenderás cómo construir aplicaciones seguras siguiendo estándares de la industria y frameworks como OWASP, Java Security APIs y Spring Security.

Lo Que Aprenderás:

  • Los fundamentos de la codificación segura en Java y la importancia de la seguridad en aplicaciones web modernas.

  • Vulnerabilidades comunes en aplicaciones Java, incluyendo inyección de código, autenticación rota, exposición de datos sensibles y configuraciones de seguridad incorrectas.

  • Cómo implementar mecanismos seguros de autenticación y autorización para evitar accesos no autorizados.

  • Mejores prácticas para gestión de sesiones, autenticación basada en tokens (JWT, OAuth 2.0) y hash de contraseñas seguras.

  • Cómo proteger el almacenamiento y la transmisión de datos mediante encriptación, hashing y técnicas de codificación segura.

  • Implementación de interacciones seguras con bases de datos mediante consultas parametrizadas y frameworks ORM para prevenir inyecciones SQL.

  • Métodos para evitar cross-site scripting (XSS), cross-site request forgery (CSRF) y deserialización insegura en aplicaciones web basadas en Java.

  • Uso de Java Security APIs y frameworks como Spring Security para mejorar la seguridad de las aplicaciones web.

  • Estrategias para manejo seguro de errores y registros sin exponer información sensible.

  • Principios del ciclo de vida seguro del desarrollo de software (SDLC), incluyendo pautas de codificación segura y modelado de amenazas.

  • Cómo realizar revisiones de código seguro, pruebas de penetración y análisis de código estático para identificar y corregir vulnerabilidades.

courseDetails.title: OWASP Top 10 2023 de Seguridad en APIs: Guía Completa
courseDetails.shortDescription: Domina la seguridad en APIs con OWASP Top 10 2023. Aprende vulnerabilidades, mejores prácticas y cómo mitigarlas
courseDetails.longDescription:
Las APIs son fundamentales para el desarrollo de software moderno, permitiendo la comunicación entre aplicaciones y servicios. Sin embargo, también representan un punto crítico de vulnerabilidad si no se protegen adecuadamente. La seguridad en APIs es un aspecto esencial para desarrolladores, arquitectos de software y profesionales de ciberseguridad.

Este curso ofrece un análisis completo de los 10 principales riesgos de seguridad en APIs según OWASP (versión 2023). A través de explicaciones detalladas, ejemplos prácticos y estrategias efectivas, aprenderás a identificar y mitigar las vulnerabilidades más comunes en el diseño, desarrollo e implementación de APIs.

Lo que aprenderás en este curso:

  • Una comprensión profunda de las principales amenazas de seguridad en APIs y su impacto en las aplicaciones modernas.

  • Cómo funcionan los ataques más frecuentes, incluyendo inyección de datos, autenticación rota y exposición excesiva de datos.

  • Casos reales de incidentes de seguridad en APIs y cómo pudieron haberse prevenido.

  • Aplicación de mejores prácticas para el desarrollo seguro de APIs, incluyendo autenticación robusta, control de acceso, validación de entradas y gestión de tokens.

  • Uso de herramientas y metodologías para probar la seguridad de APIs y detectar vulnerabilidades antes de su explotación.

Este curso está diseñado tanto para desarrolladores y arquitectos de software, como para profesionales de seguridad que buscan mejorar sus conocimientos en protección de APIs. No solo obtendrás teoría, sino también ejercicios prácticos que te permitirán aplicar los conceptos en escenarios reales.

Al finalizar el curso, serás capaz de diseñar, implementar y proteger APIs de manera efectiva, reduciendo riesgos y asegurando el cumplimiento de estándares de seguridad en la industria.

courseDetails.title: Microsoft Excel Eğitimi | Başlangıçtan İleri Seviyeye
courseDetails.shortDescription: İleri Seviye Excel Kullanıcısı Olmak İçin A'dan Z'ye Her Şeyi (Tablolar, Grafikler, Formüller, Tasarımlar...) Öğrenelim!
courseDetails.longDescription:
Merhaba arkadaşlar,


Bu alanda sizlere Microsoft Excel kullanmanın avantajlarından bahsetmeyeceğim, şu an bu veya benzeri kursları inceliyorsanız böyle bir bilgilendirmeye ihtiyacınızın olduğunu düşünmüyorum ancak bu eğitimin içeriğine ve eğitimden maksimum fayda sağlayabilmek için uygulayabileceğiniz birkaç küçük bilgiye değinmek istiyorum.


Excel eğitim kursumuz, kurs içeriğinden de anlaşılacağı üzere teorik ve pratik kabiliyet kazandırıp öğrenme sürecinin pekiştirilebilmesi açısından tıpkı lise, üniversite ders müfredatlarında olduğu gibi belirli bir disiplin ve metodik sıralı hiyerarşiye bağlı kalarak hazırlanmıştır. Yani emeklemeden koşturmaya yönelik gereksiz ve zorlayıcı bir sürecin içinde olmayacaksınız.


Bununla birlikte kursumuz 28 saat uzunluğunda olup içinde 22 bölüm, 217 ders, 180 formül, +1.000 benzersiz bilgi, +1.000 örnek/genel tekrar, başlangıç ve bitiş aşamasında olmak üzere 2 adet Seviye Tespit Sınavı, 70 adet egzersiz dosyası barındırmaktadır.


Yine hem kurs isminden hem de içindekiler öğelerinden de anlaşılacağı üzere eğitim kursumuz, temelden yani başlangıçtan ileri seviyeye olmak üzere her seviyeye hitap edebilecek şekilde mümkün olduğunca basit ancak detaylı, aceleden uzak tane tane anlatım metodu benimsenerek hazırlanmıştır. Bu açıdan eğer iyi bildiğinizi düşündüğünüz bir ders veya konu varsa ilgili dersi pas geçmek de bir tercih olsa da bu yolu tercih etmenizi tavsiye etmiyorum. Her ne kadar derslerin açıklama kısmında ilgili derslerin içerikleri paylaşılmış olsa da dersin işlenme aşamasında farklı konu ve noktalara değinilmiş olabilir. Öte yandan hem bu tercih yerine (yani dersi izlemeden pas geçmek) hem de hem de video akışını kendi anlama ve öğrenme alışkanlığınıza uygun olarak kalibre edebilmek adına ders videolarının hızını arttırmayı ya da azaltmayı birinci seçenek olarak değerlendirmeniz yararınıza olacaktır.


Öğrenme sürecinize pozitif etki edebilecek bazı tavsiyeler de vermek istiyorum.


  • Konsantre olun. Ders videolarını izlerken konsantrasyonunuzu olumsuz etkileyecek faktörleri minimize etmelisiniz.

  • Not alın. Zorlandığınız veya karıştırdığınız noktalarda basit ve adım adım notlar almanız yazım esnasında da size tekrar etme imkanı vereceğinden etkili olacaktır.

  • Pratik yapın. Ders videolarının önemli bir kısmında pratik yapabilmeniz için ilgili derse ait egzersiz dosyaları bulunmaktadır. Hem bu dosyalar üzerinden hem de farklı kaynaklardan bulacağınız örneklerle bol bol pratik yapmanız öğrenme sürecinizin kısalmasına büyük katkı verecektir.

  • Farklı kaynaklardan da yararlanın. Yalnızca bu ders içeriğinde alacağınız bilgilerle yetinmeyin, farklı kaynaklar üzerinden de araştırma yapmanız, video izlemeniz hem tekrar etme ve pratik yapma imkanı sunacak hem de bilgi dağarcığınızı zenginleştirecektir.

  • Ders videolarının hızını arttırın. Ders videolarını izledikten sonra hızı arttırarak tekrar izlemek dersin pekiştirilmesi açısından önemli katkı verecektir.

  • Disiplinli olun. Bu aşamada size verebileceğim en önemli tavsiyem azimli ve disiplinli olmanızdır. Kendinize göre periyodik bir planlama yaparak düzenli bir biçimde dersleri izlemeniz, araştırmanız, azami derecede pratik yapmanız son derece önemlidir. Zira herhangi bir kaynaktan alacağınız bilgi hap niteliğinde değildir, takviyedir. Bu takviye ancak azim ve disiplin ile birleştiği takdirde öğrenme hızınızı ve becerinizi maksimize edecektir.


Excel kullanım kabiliyetinizin ileri seviye olarak değerlendirilmesi konusunda dünya genelinde kabul görmüş standartlar bulunmamaktadır. Bununla birlikte ileri seviye Excel kullanıcısı olmak için aslında öne çıkan iki parametre vardır; hız ve bilgi. Bu açıdan öncelikli hedefimiz bilgi birikimimizi arttırmak sonrasında ise bol pratik ile hızlanmak olmalıdır. İleri seviye Excel kullanıcısı olabilmeniz için bilginizi ve hızınızı arttıracak tüm girdileri bu eğitim kursumuzda bulabileceksiniz.


Öte yandan başlangıç ve bitiş sınavları ile birlikte kat ettiğiniz mesafeyi eğitimin sonunda kendiniz de görebileceksiniz.


Umarım keyifli ve faydalı bir eğitim süreci olur, sağlıcakla:)
targetAudiences: Microsoft Excel kullanımını öğrenmek ya da mevcut deneyimini/seviyesini ilerletmek isteyen herkes katılım gösterebilir.

courseDetails.title: QA Metrics & KPIs: Testing, Defect Tracking & Automation
courseDetails.shortDescription: Master QA & QC metrics, test planning, bug tracking, test automation KPIs, and QA reporting techniques
courseDetails.longDescription:
Deliver Better Software Through Measurable Quality – Learn to Track, Analyze, and Optimize QA Performance

In today’s fast-paced development world, delivering high-quality software isn’t enough—you need to prove it with metrics. That’s where this course comes in.

QA Metrics Workshop: Testing, Defect Tracking & Automation is a practical, in-depth course designed to help QA professionals leverage data and key performance indicators (KPIs) to improve testing efficiency, reduce risk, and boost software quality. Whether you work in a manual testing, automation, or agile QA environment, this course will help you transform your testing process into a measurable, strategic asset.


What This Course Offers

You’ll learn not just what metrics to track, but why they matter, how to calculate them, and when to apply them. We’ll cover all key areas of modern QA work:

  • Test Metrics: Test case pass/fail rates, execution progress, test coverage, defect detection effectiveness, and more

  • Defect Metrics: Defect density, leakage rate, mean time to detect/fix, severity/priority distribution

  • Test Automation KPIs: Automation coverage, stability, ROI, execution time, flakiness rate

  • Reporting & Dashboards: learn metrics tha will help you to build stakeholder-facing reports using tools like Jira, TestRail, Excel, and custom dashboards

  • QA Process Improvement: Use metrics to drive retrospectives, quality gates, and team performance evaluations

  • Agile QA Metrics: Story-level quality, velocity-to-bug ratio, sprint test readiness, continuous testing indicators

  • Risk-Based Testing: Prioritize efforts based on impact, past defect trends, and test effectiveness

You’ll also get templates, formulas, KPI scorecards, and visual dashboard examples that you can adapt directly into your projects.


Who This Course Is For

  • Manual Testers who want to better demonstrate their impact through test results

  • Automation Engineers who need to show ROI and stability of their frameworks

  • QA Leads & Managers looking to implement measurable quality processes and KPIs

  • Agile QA Practitioners who need to align quality metrics with fast delivery cycles

  • Business Analysts & Product Owners who want to understand what QA metrics actually say about product health


What You’ll Gain

By the end of this course, you will:

  • Be able to define, collect, and report on metrics that matter to your project

  • Know how to communicate test status and quality to developers, PMs, and execs

  • Be confident in using data to drive continuous QA process improvements

  • Have practical tools and ready-to-use templates that make metrics actionable

This isn’t a theoretical course. It’s a practical QA toolkit packed with examples, industry best practices, and data you can start applying immediately to improve your QA outcomes and career.

Enroll now and make your testing efforts visible, valuable, and impactful through the power of metrics.

courseDetails.title: Basics of Scalping in Forex, Crypto and Stocks for Beginners
courseDetails.shortDescription: Learn Step-by-Step Scalping Strategies for Fast, Consistent Profits Using EMA, VWAP, Bollinger Bands, and Price Action
courseDetails.longDescription:
What this course is

This is a practical, outcome-focused trading course that teaches short-duration market strategies (scalping) using price action, volatility measures, volume, and trend filters. It is a step-by-step training program for traders who want to capture many small, high-probability moves each trading day. It is not a get-rich-quick promise, not a set of secret indicators, and not an academic lecture. It is a trade-engineering program: build, test, practice, and refine.

This trading course is explicitly optimized for people who trade forex trading instruments, crypto trading pairs, or liquid index/stock instruments. Strategies and risk templates are mapped to the unique characteristics of each market.

Key outcomes — what you will be able to do after completing this trading course

  • Confidently identify high-probability scalping setups on lower timeframes (M1, M5) for forex trading and crypto trading.

  • Apply a consistent checklist for entries based on confluence between EMAs, VWAP, volume, and momentum indicators.

  • Use volatility-based methods (ATR and Bollinger Bands) to size stops, place targets, and decide when not to trade.

  • Read volume and tick activity to detect institutional participation and avoid false breakouts.

  • Implement dynamic trailing stops and management rules that protect gains while allowing winners to run.

  • Design and backtest a personalized scalping plan and a risk-control framework suitable for forex trading and crypto trading.

  • Maintain professional trade logs, performance metrics, and iterative improvement processes.

Who this trading course is for


  • New traders who want a structured path into short-term trading and practical skills for forex trading and crypto trading.

  • Active day traders who want to add proven scalping strategies to their toolkit.

  • Part-time traders who need high-probability, fast-execution setups that fit limited screen time.

  • Technical traders who prefer rule-based systems over discretionary guessing.

  • Traders who already use MT4, MT5, or TradingView and want to convert indicators into a reliable routine.

This course is not aimed at long-term investors looking for portfolio allocation strategies, nor at people seeking speculative tips without risk management.

Detailed syllabus — module by module

Module 0 — Orientation and setup

  • Course objectives, expected outcomes, and weekly practice schedule.

  • How to set up MT4/MT5 and TradingView workspaces for scalping. Templates provided.

  • Broker selection criteria for scalping: spreads, execution, slippage, and order types (ECN vs STP).

  • Demo account setup and safety checklist.

Module 1 — Foundations: Market structure and micro timeframes

  • Understanding tick behavior, liquidity, and market microstructure.

  • The difference in behavior between forex trading pairs, crypto trading pairs, and equities.

  • How to read one-minute and five-minute structures without overfitting.

Module 2 — Essential indicators and how to use them (practical rules)

  • EMA 9, EMA 20, EMA 200: exact use cases, entry filters, and conflict rules.

  • VWAP: constructing intraday bias and trade timing around the value area.

  • RSI and Stochastic: momentum confirmation rules and false-signal mitigation.

  • Bollinger Bands and ATR: volatility assessment and stop-placement formulas.

  • Volume and tick charts: interpreting spikes, divergence, and institutional signatures.

Module 3 — Price action and candlestick reading on lower timeframes

  • Single-candle and multi-candle patterns that matter for scalping: hammer, engulfing, doji, marubozu.

  • Quick methods to validate a pattern using multi-timeframe checks.

  • Combining price action with indicator confluence for immediate trade decisions.

Module 4 — Support & resistance, zones, and psychological levels

  • How to mark high-probability zones in 60 seconds and why zones work better than exact lines.

  • Round-number psychology and session highs/lows as trade frames.

  • Fast-entry templates: bounce, retest, and breakout rules.

Module 5 — Breakout vs pullback trading (scalping variants)

  • Objective rules for breakout entries: confirmation candle, volume threshold, and stop placement.

  • Pullback entry templates: ideal retracement sizes, acceptable risk windows, and trade management.

  • Statistical performance expectations and when to prefer one method over the other.

Module 6 — Volatility and stop management (ATR-driven rules)

  • Compute ATR-based stop distances and convert to position sizing.

  • How to set realistic TP targets for scalping: fixed pip, ATR-multiple, or momentum-based exits.

  • Trailing stop algorithms that protect winners without premature exits.

Module 7 — Volume analysis and tick charts for superior timing

  • Practical volume cues that predict continuation versus exhaustion.

  • Tick chart application: when to switch from time-based to tick-based charts.

  • Examples of institutional footprints and how to follow them on forex trading vs crypto trading instruments.

Module 8 — Risk control, position sizing, and money management

  • Concrete spreadsheets and calculators for position sizing tied to account risk.

  • Session-level risk controls and daily loss limits.

  • Correlation controls: avoiding simultaneous exposure across correlated forex trading pairs.

Module 9 — Psychology, routines, and trade discipline

  • Pre-session checklists, trade entry scripts, and rules for automated discipline.

  • Post-trade review processes and how to interpret performance metrics.

  • Handling streaks: actionable procedures for both winning and losing runs.

Module 10 — Strategy construction, testing, and live drills

  • Build a personal scalping system using provided blueprints.

  • Backtest procedures and realistic forward-testing on demo accounts.

  • Live-procedure drills: how to run a 60-minute practice session that yields learning, not noise.


Teaching method and learning workflow

  • Lecture → Immediate practice: every core lesson ends with a short exercise you complete on a demo chart.

  • Checklists and decision trees: each strategy comes with a one-page checklist you can use in real time.

  • Backtest kit: downloadable spreadsheets and TradingView watchlists for controlled testing.

  • Live annotated charts and trade replay: see the setups applied in actual market conditions.

  • Assessment: practice assignments, strategy submission, and feedback templates for self-review.

Prerequisites and technical requirements

  • Basic familiarity with trading platform navigation (placing orders, reading charts). If you do not have this, a short primer module is included.

  • A PC or laptop with stable internet and access to TradingView or MT4/MT5.

  • A free demo trading account (recommended for the entire course practice period).

  • No coding knowledge is required.

Why this trading course is different

  • Every rule is actionable and quantifiable. No vague advice.

  • Market-specific templates: forex trading and crypto trading differences are explicitly taught and applied.

  • Emphasis on repeatability: you will leave with a checklist-driven system you can run in real time.

  • Balanced focus: technical tools, volatility control, and human performance (psychology and routines).

Common objections and answers

  • “Is scalping too risky?” Scalping concentrates risk into many small, controlled exposures with strict stop logic. This course teaches risk-first procedures so risk per trade is defined and small.

  • “Will this work for crypto trading?” Yes. Crypto-specific volatility and exchange considerations are covered with adapted sizing and execution rules.

  • “Do I need an expensive broker?” No. You need a broker or exchange with low, consistent spreads and reliable execution; recommendations and screening checklists are provided.
targetAudiences: Beginners who want to start trading but prefer fast results and short trades instead of long-term investing.
Day Traders & Swing Traders who want to add scalping techniques to their trading arsenal for extra opportunities.
Intermediate Traders looking to refine their entry/exit timing using professional tools like VWAP, EMA, RSI, and ATR.
Technical Analysis Learners who want to practice chart reading and momentum confirmation on lower timeframes (M1–M5).
